name: bookmark-index
title: Bookmark Index
description: Match the current browser URL against your bookmark collections
author: mike

commands.name: match-url
commands.title: Match URL
commands.subtitle: Bookmark Index
commands.description: Get the URL from the frontmost browser and find matching bookmark collections

commands.name: show-tab-group
commands.title: Show Tab Group
commands.subtitle: Bookmark Index
commands.description: View and edit human-authored project and notes on the active Safari tab group

commands.name: sync-tab-groups
commands.title: Sync Tab Groups
commands.subtitle: Bookmark Index
commands.description: Refresh Safari tab groups from Safari's cache into the local index

preferences.name: openrouterApiKey
preferences.title: OpenRouter API Key
preferences.description: Your OpenRouter API key for LLM-based URL matching

preferences.name: verboseLogging
preferences.title: Verbose Logging
preferences.description: Enable verbose logging to bookmark-index.log (next to bookmarks.db)
preferences.label: Enable

preferences.name: noCache
preferences.title: Skip Cache
preferences.description: Always skip the match cache and force a fresh LLM match
preferences.label: Enable

preferences.name: langfuseSecretKey
preferences.title: Langfuse Secret Key
preferences.description: Langfuse secret key for observability. Leave blank to disable.

preferences.name: langfusePublicKey
preferences.title: Langfuse Public Key
preferences.description: Langfuse public key for observability. Leave blank to disable.

preferences.name: langfuseBaseUrl
preferences.title: Langfuse Base URL
preferences.description: Langfuse API base URL. Leave blank to disable.
